name: MSI MPG B760I EDGE WIFI Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-7200+(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E - BT 5.3 (B760IEDGEWIFI)
shortName: MSI MPG B760I EDGE WIFI Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Mini-ITX motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with DDR5, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 6E for compact high-performance builds.
